creator: rabbitmq@geoffgarside.co.uk
text:
I've fixed the issue with 7.4 and it now builds properly both with and without POPT from ports.

The issue was related to the removed patch files, these have been re-introduced and updated. The patch-configure.ac has been updated to apply cleanly and the patch-tools_common.c has been moved to patch-tools_unix_process.c as the pipeline function has been moved from tools/common.c to tools/unix/process.c.

--
Geoff
